faqs.question: Do you work remotely?
faqs.answer: Yes. GLIKCH is primarily online and remote right now, with local focus around Burnsville, Asheville, NC, and surrounding areas.

faqs.question: Are all products sold directly by GLIKCH?
faqs.answer: Some products are GLIKCH concepts or direct offerings, while others may become affiliate, dropshipped, or partner marketplace items.

faqs.question: Can you help with cybersecurity safely and ethically?
faqs.answer: Yes. GLIKCH focuses on defensive, educational, and authorized security work only.

faqs.question: What happens after I request a service?
faqs.answer: Your request is queued for review and can later be connected to email delivery, CRM, or ticketing automation.

banners.title: Repair. Build. Secure. Automate.
banners.body: Tech support from the timeline where the arcade kid became the cybersecurity engineer.

banners.title: Nerd-grade gear, courses, and tools.
banners.body: Cybersecurity hardware, education, merch, books, and affiliate-ready catalog structure.

process.title: Consultation
process.body: We start by understanding the goal, deadline, risk, and what success looks like.

process.title: Diagnosis / Discovery
process.body: Systems, symptoms, code, or requirements are reviewed with practical notes and honest constraints.

process.title: Planning
process.body: The work is broken into clear steps so cost, scope, and safety stay visible.

process.title: Build / Repair / Secure
process.body: Implementation focuses on clean architecture, repeatable setup, and secure defaults.

process.title: Testing
process.body: Changes are checked across devices and workflows before handoff.

process.title: Delivery / Support
process.body: You get readable next steps, documentation, and support options after delivery.
